description_long: This is a two-seater chaise with a sturdy wooden frame and armrests on both sides, featuring a natural wood grain finish. The seat and backrest are fitted with thick, plush brown leather cushions, providing both comfort and a touch of luxury. Two square, matching leather throw pillows are placed against the backrest, enhancing the inviting appearance. The back and sides of the frame are constructed from solid wood panels, giving the piece a robust and grounded look. The legs are short, straight, and made of wood, with small black feet for stability. The overall design is modern yet classic, suitable for urban parks, public seating areas, or stylish outdoor lounges.
description: A two-seater chaise with a wooden frame, brown leather cushions, and armrests on both sides. It features a modern, robust design with plush seating and matching throw pillows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the chaise, two seat cushions, two backrest cushions, and two square throw pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the solid wooden armrest and panel construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden back panel and the tops of the backrest cushions, with no visible cushions or pillows from this angle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other armrest and the arrangement of the cushions from the side.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight and moderately high, composed of two large, rectangular leather cushions that provide ample support. It is simple in design, with no visible tufting or decorative elements, and is framed by the wooden structure.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, constructed from solid wood with a flat, wide surface and a natural wood grain finish.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and made of wood, with a simple cylindrical shape and small black feet at the base for added stability.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid brown leather with a smooth, unpatterned finish, giving it a sleek and modern appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large seat cushions and two large backrest cushions, all loose and covered in brown leather. Additionally, two smaller square throw pillows are placed in front of the backrest cushions, creating a layered and inviting arrangement.
